selection_note: correct high activation closest to associated-class q90
interpretation: This long-span PPV pattern captures gravity-removed linear acceleration on the device y-axis over about 49 samples. It may reflect broad movement shape, transition timing, or sustained orientation/velocity structure, but only in sensor coordinates. The interval overlaps padded samples, so the meaning is representation-dependent.
localization_caveat: Representative strongest PPV response interval; the PPV feature pools over all response positions and does not identify a unique causal instant.
